title: Phishing campaign targets payroll team
description: Staff members received urgent email messages asking them to verify payroll credentials through a login link. Multiple recipients reported similar wording.
summary: Potential phishing incident reported in Staff members received urgent email messages asking them to verify payroll crede
checklist: Do not click links or download attachments from the message.
Report the sender and message in your email client.
Reset your password and enable MFA if any credential was entered.
